tasks.title: Provision and activate a cell site
tasks.prompt: Drive oss-ran-sim/core-prov-sim to provision and activate a new cell site; verify it carries traffic.

tasks.title: Sequence work around live traffic
tasks.prompt: Order RAN/transport changes to avoid degrading active subscribers during a maintenance window.

tasks.title: Predict coverage/capacity impact
tasks.prompt: Estimate the coverage and capacity change from the proposed transport reconfiguration.

tasks.title: DOIL intent for the change
tasks.prompt: Encode the activation as a DOIL intent with rollback constraints.
